title: Chernihiv: Shelling near civilians
description: Eleven people were injured in Kyiv during a nighttime Russian attack, including a child. Even before the announcement of the air alert, there were hits on civilian infrastructure. Operational services are working on the ground: residential buildings, offices, theological seminary were damaged in the capital. The liquidation of the consequences of shelling continues in Odesa, Sumy, Kharkiv and Chernihiv regions. Russia used...
description_en: Eleven people were injured in Kyiv during a nighttime Russian attack, including a child. Even before the announcement of the air alert, there were hits on civilian infrastructure. Operational services are working on the ground: residential buildings, offices, theological seminary were damaged in the capital. The liquidation of the consequences of shelling continues in Odesa, Sumy, Kharkiv and Chernihiv regions. Russia used...
description_uk: Одинадцять людей поранено у Києві під час нічної російської атаки, серед них дитина. Ще до оголошення повітряної тривоги були влучання по цивільній інфраструктурі. На місцях працюють оперативні служби: житлові будинки, офіси, богословська семінарія були пошкоджені у столиці. Триває ліквідація наслідків обстрілу і в Одеській, Сумській, Харківській та Чернігівській областях. Росія застосувала...

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Update: The number of people injured in Russia's ballistic missile attack on Kyiv has risen to eight. The injured include an 11-year-old boy. Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko said four of the injured were hospitalized, while the others received medical treatment at the scene.
description_en: Update: The number of people injured in Russia's ballistic missile attack on Kyiv has risen to eight. The injured include an 11-year-old boy. Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko said four of the injured were hospitalized, while the others received medical treatment at the scene.

title: Drone attack
description: Meanwhile, hundreds of our drones are attacking Russia. In total, about 270 good drones were sent. We are waiting for good results and beautiful videos in the morning.

title: Strike confirmed

title: Air defense active
description: Missiles for the Patriot will probably be produced in Germany, not on the territory of Ukraine, writes Reuters Agency sources familiar with the discussions said that the new interceptor missiles will probably be produced in Germany or another European country, where it is safer, and production can be transferred to Ukraine after the end of the war. At the same time, even in this case it is not worth...
description_en: Missiles for the Patriot will probably be produced in Germany, not on the territory of Ukraine, writes Reuters Agency sources familiar with the discussions said that the new interceptor missiles will probably be produced in Germany or another European country, where it is safer, and production can be transferred to Ukraine after the end of the war. At the same time, even in this case it is not worth...
description_uk: Ракеты для Patriot, вероятно, будут производиться в Германии, а не на территории Украины, пишет Reuters Источники агентства, знакомые с обсуждениями, сообщили, что новые ракеты-перехватчики, вероятно, будут произведены в Германии или другой европейской стране, где это безопаснее, а производство может быть перенесено на Украину после окончания войны. В то же время, даже в этом случае не стоит...

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: FREYA. This is our Ukrainian anti-ballistics. This project is an anti-ballistic system, which should be an analogue of the Patriot in terms of hitting ballistic targets, but a more mass-produced and cheaper system. This is a European model. Our first meeting in this direction will be in France, and it will be in the near future. Our task was to gather leaders, companies, national security advisers and present...
description_en: FREYA. This is our Ukrainian anti-ballistics. This project is an anti-ballistic system, which should be an analogue of the Patriot in terms of hitting ballistic targets, but a more mass-produced and cheaper system. This is a European model. Our first meeting in this direction will be in France, and it will be in the near future. Our task was to gather leaders, companies, national security advisers and present...
description_uk: FREYA. Це наша українська антибалістика. Цей проєкт – це антибалістична система, яка повинна бути аналогом Patriot щодо збиття балістичних цілей, але більш масового виробництва і більш дешевою системою. Це європейська модель. Перша наша зустріч у цьому напрямку буде у Франції, і це буде найближчим часом. Нашим завданням було зібрати лідерів, компанії, радників з питань нацбезпеки і представити...

title: Casualties reported
description: 🤖 NRK performed more than 16,600 missions at the front in a month 👥 Units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine performed more than 16,600 logistical and evacuation missions with the help of ground robotic complexes in June. Ground drones continue to replace the military in the most difficult areas of the front: delivering ammunition and food, as well as evacuating the wounded and dead. 🗒 Dynamics of missions by month: 🟡January – 7...
description_en: 🤖 NRK performed more than 16,600 missions at the front in a month 👥 Units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine performed more than 16,600 logistical and evacuation missions with the help of ground robotic complexes in June. Ground drones continue to replace the military in the most difficult areas of the front: delivering ammunition and food, as well as evacuating the wounded and dead. 🗒 Dynamics of missions by month: 🟡January – 7...
description_uk: 🤖 НРК виконали понад 16 600 місій на фронті за місяць 👥 Підрозділи Сил оборони України у червні виконали за допомогою наземних роботизованих комплексів понад 16 600 логістичних та евакуаційних місій. Наземні дрони продовжують заміняти військових на найскладніших ділянках фронту: доставляють боєприпаси й харчування, а також евакуюють поранених та полеглих. 🗒 Динаміка місій по місяцях: 🟡січень – 7...
